experimental_design: cecal slurry-induced sepsis model with treatment comparison
we investigated the mechanisms underlying sepsis-induced skeletal muscle dysfunction using a cecal slurry-induced sepsis mouse model
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: n=5 and n=3 in RNA was extracted from gastrocnemius muscles collected from control mice (n = 5) and mice on day 4 after sepsis induction (n = 3)
